mnemonics.title: STRIDE Threat Categories
mnemonics.content:
S - Spoofing (pretending to be someone else)
T - Tampering (modifying data improperly)
R - Repudiation (denying actions)
I - Information Disclosure (exposing data)
D - Denial of Service (making unavailable)
E - Elevation of Privilege (gaining unauthorized access)

mnemonics.title: Security Requirement Types
mnemonics.content:
FANCY Requirements:
F - Functional (what the system does)
A - Attributes (non-functional qualities)
N - Needs (business requirements)
C - Constraints (limitations and policies)
Y - Yields (expected outcomes)
